content.en:
"The forces behind Jiuhu Mountain are amazing, just one assessment is so demanding!"

Ye Tian muttered.

His interest in joining the forces behind Jiuhu Mountain has increased greatly now.

"Let's pass this test first!"

Ye Tian silently comprehended.

Although he was given 10 million years of the Dao Era, it won't be long before he can pass the assessment.

Time passes.

About 300,000 years have passed, and Ye Tian has successfully comprehended a pseudo-Dao secret technique.

Airplanes!!!!!

A pseudo-Dao secret technique was released by Ye Tian and presented it perfectly.

"Congratulations on successfully passing the assessment and obtaining a Bronze Order of the Nine Extremes Alliance!"

Airplanes!

A bronze token appeared in Ye Tian's hand.

This is naturally not ordinary bronze, but eternal bronze, an incomparably precious material, but what is really precious is the meaning of the Bronze Order of the Nine Extremes Alliance, and having it is equivalent to joining the Nine Extremes Alliance.

"Nine Pole Alliance, the force behind Jiuhu Mountain is the Nine Pole Alliance!"

Ye Tian took this bronze order, and saw that this bronze order automatically integrated into his body.

The next moment.

Countless messages poured into his soul will, giving him enough understanding of the Nine Extremes Alliance.

According to the message conveyed by the Bronze Order of the Nine Extremes Alliance, the Nine Extremes Alliance is a force built by the Nine Extremes Lord, with the purpose of communicating and trading with each other, and gradually developed into a loose joint force.

Today, the Nine Extremes Alliance has more than 30 country lords, with more than 100,000 Eternal Dao realms, all over the major countries.

Of course.

Most of the members of the Nine Extremes Alliance are still cultivated internally, such as the high-level heirs of the Nine Extremes Alliance, etc., and there are very few members of the Nine Extremes Alliance recruited from the outside world, and the requirements are extremely high.

The Nine Polar Alliance does not have a fixed headquarters, after all, it is only a loose alliance organization.

The purpose of the Nine Poles Alliance is to exchange and trade, and it will also shelter the forces in which it is located.

For example, if he has now joined the Nine Extremes Alliance in the name of Luo Xia Pavilion, then the Nine Extremes Alliance will protect Luo Xia Pavilion, and if he encounters ordinary problems, the Nine Extremes Alliance will give some help, but that's all.

Of course, don't expect the Nine Extremes Alliance to give Luo Xia Pavilion much help.

The reason why many Eternal Dao Realms are so crazy about wanting to join the Nine Extremes Alliance is because by joining the Nine Extremes Alliance, they can have the opportunity to exchange for the Eternal Dao Species, and it is not a second-grade Eternal Dao Species, but a primary or even intermediate Eternal Dao Species.

"No wonder Luo Wushuang said that many Eternal Dao Realms are eager for the Nine Lakes Mountain Token, and they think that I am here for this treasure. "

"But for me, there are also many benefits to joining the Nine Pole Alliance, and I can get more inheritance knowledge. "

The Nine Poles Alliance is mainly traded within the Nine Poles Alliance, and transactions are carried out with Nine Pole Points.

He only joined the Nine Extremes Alliance, and he only had an initial 100 points, while the primary Eternal Dao Seed needed one million Nine Pole points.

However, the inferior Eternal Dao Seed only needs 10,000 points to redeem it.

Airplanes!

The Nine Lakes Mountain Inheritance Land teleported Ye Tian out.

Immediately.

Ye Tian left from here, but just as he was leaving, there was an Eternal Dao Realm staring at him.

In addition to the Eternal Dao Realm of the top powers, ordinary Eternal Dao Realm to obtain the Jiuhu Mountain Token, they all have to be careful, hide their identities, and find a way to escape when they come out, not daring to stay.

But Ye Tian was not afraid, if there was an Eternal Dao Realm who dared to attack him, it would be looking for death!

After joining the Nine Extremes Alliance, even if he encounters an Eternal Dao Realm whose strength far surpasses his own, he can ask for help.

Every member of the Nine Extremes Alliance has three chances to call for help, and the Eternal Dao Realm who comes to support them can obtain Nine Extremes Points, which are paid by the Nine Extremes Alliance.

Therefore, in this area of the Auggu Kingdom, no force dares to attack and kill the members of the Nine Extremes Alliance.

Soon.

The void twisted, and an Eternal Dao Realm walked out.

This Eternal Supreme Dao Realm is the peak cultivation of the Eternal Supreme Dao Realm, but it has not condensed the Eternal Dao Species.

By copying the talent, Ye Tian knew the other party's name.

【Kirai】

Qihai stopped Ye Tian, "Your Excellency came out of Jiuhu Mountain, you must have the Jiuhu Mountain token in your hand, can you sell it to me?"

"Get out!"

Ye Tian snorted coldly.

Qi Hai's face showed annoyance, he was a powerhouse at the peak of the Eternal Dao Realm, and a guy from the early stage of the Eternal Dao Realm dared to talk to him like this.

"Look for death!"

Kirami struck.

However, as soon as they fought, he was confused.

Rumble!

Qihai was directly blasted away, and an eternal primordial treasure on his body protected his body, but under the impact, his injuries were not light.

"This is the early stage of the Eternal Dao Realm, and the strength is too terrifying!"

Qi Hai trembled, it was the first time he had encountered such a demonic Eternal Dao Realm early stage powerhouse!

Just when Ye Tian was about to continue to kill, a green lotus in the void protected the Qihai, and Ye Tian's attack fell on the green lotus, but it did not shake it at all.

"Eternal Dao Secret Technique!"

Ye Tian recognized it.

Moreover, this is not a pseudo-Eternal Dao Secret Technique, but a real Eternal Dao Secret Technique.

Naturally, this secret technique was not performed by Qihai, but by other Eternal Dao Realms.

Wow!

A young man walked out, the cultivation on his body was only in the late stage of the Eternal Dao Realm, but his aura was extremely terrifying, exuding the power of the Eternal Dao Body.

This is an Eternal Dao Realm powerhouse who has condensed the Eternal Dao Seed and cultivated the Eternal Dao Body.

"Lord Xuehe, this guy is the enemy of our Liuli Mountain, please kill him!"

Qihai hurriedly said.

"Get out!" Xue He said coldly, "Are you using me to kill the members of the Nine Extremes Alliance?"

"What, members of the Nine Extremes Alliance?"

Qi Hai was stunned, and then he realized that Ye Tian was actually a member of the Nine Extremes Alliance.

Because Xue He was a member of the Nine Extremes Alliance, he had soared into the sky, so he was extremely eager to obtain a Nine Lakes Mountain token.

Unexpectedly, Ye Tian actually passed the assessment.

The members of the Nine Extremes Alliance can sense each other, but they can only know when they are close.

Therefore, Ye Tian also knew that Xue He was one of the members of the Nine Extremes Alliance.

"Brother Dao, this time it's our Liuli Mountain, it's not right, I hope it's over!"

"Good!"

Ye Tian agreed.

"Don't get out yet!"

Xue He kicked Qihai violently and directly kicked Qihai away.

Qihai hurriedly fled, not daring to stay here.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian communicated with Xue He, and then he knew that the news that he had become a member of the Nine Extremes Alliance had spread, and there were not many members of the Nine Extremes Alliance in the Auga Realm, and there had been no Eternal Dao Realm to join for a long time.

Therefore, after Xuehe learned the information, he was ready to come over to take a look, and by the way, he got acquainted, but he encountered such a thing.
